name: seg3-anime
prompt: [LIGHTING ANCHOR] 深夜凌晨2点。室内极暗，电脑屏幕蓝白光是主光源，映在角色脸上。窗外远处有微弱城市霓虹（暖色）。无日光、无室内灯。整体色调：深蓝+黑+微暖霓虹点缀。Genshin Impact 3D anime style. The young Chinese man with black glasses and gray hoodie opens a new file on his laptop. His fingers fly across the keyboard at incredible speed, code cascading down the screen like a waterfall. A system notification appears: 「首个任务：修复全球最大开源项目的致命bug。奖励：10万经验值」He reads it, then the corner of his mouth curves upward into a confident half-smile. Screen glow intensifies on his face. He says: "十万经验值...行，让我看看这个bug长什么样。" He cracks his knuckles and starts typing again, eyes focused and sharp. Normal speed, natural pacing. Chinese Mandarin.
